mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month growth in retail sales signals resilient household demand and near-term revenue support, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth does not produce a positive 20-day return spread versus lower growth in walk-forward tests, or if Rank IC is below 0.03 over two consecutive 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the federal funds rate tightens financial conditions and raises equity discount rates, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days after a tightening threshold is crossed.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered tightening episodes are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if their mean return is not below the unconditional mean at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll growth combined with a low unemployment rate confirms a durable expansion with improving income and consumption, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS rises over 3 months and UNRATE < 5.0%
regime_hint: late-cycle expansion with still-positive job creation
failure_condition: Reject if the joint condition does not outperform periods with weak payroll growth or UNRATE >= 5.0% over 60 trading days, or if the interaction coefficient is not positive in walk-forward regressions.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in industrial production signals weakening real output and earnings momentum, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days when production growth turns decisively negative.
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO contraction triggers are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if triggered returns are not lower than non-triggered returns.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in housing starts signals weakening residential investment and household cyclicality, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if year-over-year HOUST declines greater than 10% are not followed by below-median 60-day S&P 500 returns, or if the return hit rate is not worse than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating CPI while the funds rate is rising creates an inflation-pressure regime in which policy tightening threatens valuation multiples, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized growth > 3% and FEDFUNDS rises over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if the CPI acceleration and FEDFUNDS increase interaction has a non-negative coefficient for 20-day returns in walk-forward tests or if triggered returns exceed baseline returns.

mechanism_narrative: Positive real GDP growth signals broad demand expansion and stronger aggregate earnings, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if positive quarterly GDPC1 growth does not produce higher 60-day S&P 500 returns than negative or flat GDPC1 growth, or if the effect is unstable across two consecutive expansions.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid rise in unemployment signals labor-market deterioration and recession risk repricing, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if UNRATE increases greater than 0.3pp over 3 months are not followed by negative average 5-day S&P 500 returns or if the triggered hit rate is no worse than baseline.
